description: Deathbed will by Yefet ha-Levi. Location: Damascus. Dating: Unknown, but see verso. In which he dedicates one-third of an orchard and a house located in the village of Hammuriyya near Damascus and stipulates the income of the estate is to be used to purchase food for students of the law. Two trustees are appointed, Yequti’el and Petahya. (Moshe Gil, Documents of the Jewish Pious Foundations from the Cairo Geniza, Brill, 1976, 482-4) EMS
description_he: צוואת שכיב מרע של יפת הלוי, דמשק. מוקדש שליש מפרדס ובית בכפר חמוריה ליד דמשק; הכנסותיהם ייועדו לרכישת מזון לתלמידי חכמים. אפוטרופסים: יקותיאל ופתחיה.
